publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-12-03 18:21:04 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration. Center for Professional Development

did.physdesc: Correspondence, photographs, reports, and other records.
did.abstract: General office files include summer school records, accounting records, general correspondence, housing records, photographs, and annual reports.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: General office files include summer school records, accounting records, general correspondence, housing records, photographs, and annual reports.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Center for Professional Development records, #28-06-2414. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

did.unittitle: Scholarship Aid (Elie Assaf) [returned to office of origin, 5/23/89]
